title: Commercial Cleaning – Turnkey, Fully Staffed - $300K Income
reasonForSelling: Corporate location being sold as a franchise-owned location
description:
This is a home-based full service commercial janitorial company with a well-established franchise brand with over $300K income in the Wichita/Salina KS area.

This location already has infrastructure in place including customers, staff, and equipment. The owner’s role would focus on strengthening customer relationships, building the team, and continuing to grow the business.

Historically the operation has generated approximately $76K per month in recurring revenue across commercial accounts in the Wichita and Salina markets

OWNER ROLE:

The business will require an owner operator who is actively involved in the business, particularly in the early stages. Lead your cleaning team and oversee daily operations including scheduling, staffing, and service delivery

• Build and nurture relationships with B2B clients in high traffic environments through site visits, walkthroughs, and regular check-ins
• Grow your business locally by engaging in prospecting, conducting facility walkthroughs, and collaborating on tailored proposals
• Manage all aspects of the business including finances, team performance, customer satisfaction, and quality control

This is a true owner-led business. You are the boots on the ground - leading your team, building client relationships, and driving B2B growth in your local market.

REASON FOR SELLING:

The business is a corporate-owned location being sold to transition to a franchise location. The operation is already running with customers, staff, and equipment in place.

FINANCIAL PROPOSITION:

• Asking Price - $740,000
• Current revenue - $912,000
• Current Income - $300,615

CAPITAL REQUIREMENT:

• $750,000

NEXT STEP:

If you would like to learn more, you must request and complete a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) to be in position to receive full information.

Returning your NDA does NOT obligate or commit you in any way, and all information is completely confidential. There is NO cost or additional investment for our services, experience,
